calls.title: Facilio x Scouts NSW - Weekly Cadence
calls.summary: Xero integration scope clarification session. Core approved supplier bill push and approval controls are confirmed in scope and working. Four items flagged as potentially out-of-scope requiring commercial discussion: mandatory supplier bill fields, WO ID to bill reference amendment, new supplier contact creation, and ABN as unique identifier. Deepak to verify and escalate to Paul and Tyler.
key_points: Core Xero integration working: supplier bills pushed, approval controls enforced
4 out-of-scope items identified: mandatory bill fields, WO ID amendment, new contacts, ABN identifier
Nicholas requested scope verification from Deepak
Out-of-scope items to be escalated to Paul and Tyler for commercial discussion
decisions: Deepak to verify original scope and escalate out-of-scope items to Paul/Tyler for commercial decision

action_items.task: Verify scope for 4 Xero integration items and escalate to Paul/Tyler
Address previously submitted minimal-effort requests from Nicholas

risks: Scope disagreement could delay go-live or create commercial friction
4 integration items blocked pending commercial resolution
open_items: Paul and Tyler commercial decision on out-of-scope items

calls.title: Modon AM, FM & CM - MSDS, Digital Suggestion Box, Insurance, Training Plan & Quality Management
calls.summary: Requirements session covering 6 new modules: MSDS document library, digital suggestion box (QR code-based), insurance management, training plans, toolbox talks, and quality management. All design approaches agreed. Phased quality management confirmed for AM (random PPM audit) and FM (WO closure quality check) separately.
key_points: MSDS: document library with expiry tracking and dual HSE review
Digital Suggestion Box: QR code-based, categorised, manual approval workflow
Insurance: digitise certificates with expiry alerts and claim logging
Training plans: manage competencies, certifications, toolbox talks for in-house and vendor staff
Quality management (AM): percentage-based random PPM audit; (FM): quality check step before WO closure
decisions: All 6 modules scoped and design approach agreed
Phased quality management approach confirmed for AM and FM separately

action_items.task: Begin configuration for MSDS document library and expiry tracking
Configure digital suggestion box workflow
Design quality management audit framework for AM and FM

risks: Phased quality management adds implementation complexity
open_items: Toolbox talk category linkage to work permits

calls.title: Al Rayan - MSDS, Digital Suggestion Box, Insurance, Training Plan & Quality Management
calls.summary: Requirements gathering phase completed for Al Rayan covering MSDS document library, digital suggestion box (QR code-based), insurance tracking, training module, and quality management via existing inspection module. Training module was particularly well-received. Implementation to follow.
key_points: MSDS: document library with expiry tracking replacing Excel
Digital Suggestion Box: QR code-based with suggestion categorisation
Insurance: digitise specific staff/asset-linked policies with expiry alerts
Training module well-received: digitise plans, schedules, attendance, HSE reporting
Quality management: leverage existing inspection module
Requirements gathering phase completed
decisions: Requirements gathering phase completed; implementation to proceed
Quality management to use existing inspection module

action_items.task: Begin implementation of MSDS document library
Configure training module for plans, schedules, attendance tracking

open_items: Insurance tracking specific use cases to be confirmed

calls.title: RE: Facilio System - DCM
calls.summary: Post-go-live troubleshooting session revealing multiple critical system issues: excessive duplicate WO generation, incorrect WO assignment to DCM engineers instead of FM teams/vendors, NCR approval workflow gaps, TBT reporting failures, and WO expiry date calculation bug. Comprehensive FM team training blocked until data cleanup and process finalization.
key_points: Excessive duplicate work orders being generated - needs immediate fix
WOs incorrectly assigned to DCM engineers instead of FM teams/vendors
WO expiry date calculation bug
NCR: download, notification, and approval workflow all broken; community managers not in Facilio
TBT reporting: can't attach documents or close reports
Vendor/staff access and data needs updating via new onboarding template
FM training blocked on data cleanup and process finalization
decisions: New onboarding template to be shared for vendor/staff data updates
Training to proceed once bugs and data are resolved

action_items.task: Fix excessive duplicate WO generation
Fix incorrect WO assignment routing (DCM engineers vs FM teams/vendors)
Correct WO expiry date calculation bug
Resolve NCR download, notification, approval workflow; integrate community managers
Fix TBT document attachment and closure functionality
Share updated onboarding template for vendor/staff data
Schedule comprehensive FM training post data cleanup

risks: Multiple active operational blockers affecting post-go-live usage
Data integrity at risk from duplicate WO generation
Adoption at risk if bugs not resolved quickly
FM training blocked - delays competency development

calls.title: MODON CM - FarVision Integration Discussion
calls.summary: FarVision integration design session for MODON CM. SR integration via API confirmed (community/zone/tower hierarchy, no unit level). PR process via Farvision with manual GL code mapping. Oracle integration critical for master data (items, vendors) as single source of truth. GRN/consumption sync via API. PPM not in scope for this integration.
key_points: SR integration: API for creation, status updates, rejection reasons; unit-level excluded
Property hierarchy: community, zone, tower; shared area mapped to tower/zone
PR process: created in Farvision, manual GL code mapping, manual budget validation
Oracle as source of truth for item and vendor master data
GRN and consumption via API for inventory sync
PPM handled separately, no tenant notification via this integration
decisions: Unit-level data excluded from SR integration
Oracle master data as source of truth

action_items.task: Finalise API spec for SR creation, status updates, rejection reasons
Define GRN/consumption API call structure for inventory sync
Confirm Oracle master data sync approach

risks: Oracle master data consistency is critical - inconsistency will break inventory and PR flows
open_items: Full API spec for SRs and PRs

calls.title: GECO Admin Training Session 3
calls.summary: Admin training covering user access, role assignment, team and laborer management, form customization, state flows, workflows, SLA configuration, portfolio settings, and system logs. Follow-up session planned for reports and dashboards.
key_points: User access: roles, site/building/client/team assignments, user statuses, password management
Teams and laborers: creation, craft and hourly rate assignment
Form customization: fields, validation rules, custom bulk action buttons
State flows, workflows, SLAs: automation of WO status transitions and SLA commitments
Portfolio settings and logs overview
Follow-up session for reports and dashboards planned
decisions: Follow-up training session to be scheduled for reports and dashboards

action_items.task: Schedule follow-up training session for reports and dashboards

calls.title: Teyseer & Facilio - Job Plan / PM Doubts
calls.summary: Template finalisation session for job plans and PMs. Maximo export limitations are blocking complete data extraction (task details and route asset associations can't be exported). Work-arounds agreed: VLOOKUP for WO categories, Yes/No/NA task status. Follow-up Monday to finalise templates. Kipco asset import complete; CDG still in progress.
key_points: Maximo can't export job plan task details or route asset associations
VLOOKUP using asset department for WO categories as workaround
Task status options: Yes, No, Not Applicable
WO categories and priorities to be included in PM template
Follow-up meeting Monday to finalise job plans and PMs
Kipco asset import complete; CDG import in progress
decisions: VLOOKUP approach for WO categories confirmed
Monday follow-up meeting to finalise all templates

action_items.task: Finalise job plan and PM templates for Monday meeting
Complete CDG asset import
Finalise space and location details for assets

risks: Maximo export limitations increasing manual effort for template completion
CDG asset import blocking full data readiness
open_items: Route number vs asset number clarification

calls.title: Woodmans Check
calls.summary: Bug resolution session. Two confirmed bugs: (1) mobile app site filter regression from recent update (users can't select specific sites); (2) missing required field in Space form blocking new site creation (resolved). 47 Plainfield store to be set up by duplicating 45 store config. Cylinder transfer open question pending product specialist follow-up.
key_points: Mobile app site filter bug: regression from recent update, defaulting to All Sites - under investigation
Space form missing required field bug: identified and resolved, new site creation now unblocked
Email hyperlink display issue (grayed-out): suspected security/email client config, WO numbers intact
47 Plainfield store to mirror 45 store configuration
Corporate office and plaza sites to be added now Space form is fixed
Cylinder transfer follow-up with product specialist needed
decisions: Space form bug resolved; corporate office and plaza sites can now be created
47 Plainfield store to duplicate 45 store config

action_items.task: Investigate and fix mobile app site filter regression
Add corporate office and plaza sites
Set up 47 Plainfield store (mirror of 45)
Follow up with product specialist on cylinder transfer functionality

risks: Mobile app site filter regression blocking field user site selection - impacts daily operations
Email hyperlink display issue may cause user confusion
